title: Global BDD function collisions in tests/bdd
context: The tests/bdd package was unbuildable due to multiple files declaring TestFeatures and InitializeScenario
content: BDD tests using github.com/cucumber/godog within the same package must use unique names for their entry point functions (e.g., TestFeaturesObservability) and scenario initializers (e.g., InitializeScenarioObservability) to avoid 'redeclared in this block' errors.
